entries.source: "What should I be careful not to romanticize?"
entries.value: "मैले कुन कुरालाई रोमान्टिक नबनाउन सावधान हुनुपर्छ?"

entries.source: "What were your real options at this moment?"
entries.value: "त्यस क्षणमा तपाईंका वास्तविक विकल्पहरू के थिए?"

entries.source: "What would people in your time assume that modern readers might miss?"
entries.value: "तपाईंको समयमा मानिसहरूले के मान्थे जुन आधुनिक पाठकले छुटाउन सक्छन्?"

entries.source: "What would your critics say about your choices?"
entries.value: "तपाईंका आलोचकहरूले तपाईंका छनोटबारे के भन्थे?"

entries.source: "Which parts of your story are well documented?"
entries.value: "तपाईंको कथाका कुन भागहरू राम्ररी दस्तावेज गरिएका छन्?"

entries.source: a critic;
entries.value: एक आलोचक;

entries.source: a modern historian;
entries.value: एक आधुनिक इतिहासकार;

entries.source: a primary source excerpt to evaluate.
entries.value: मूल्याङ्कन गर्नुपर्ने primary source excerpt।

entries.source: a rival;
entries.value: एक प्रतिद्वन्द्वी;

entries.source: A useful historical AI response should have two layers.
entries.value: उपयोगी historical AI response मा दुई layer हुनुपर्छ।

entries.source: AI historical conversation can help when it is handled carefully.
entries.value: AI historical conversation सावधानीपूर्वक चलाइएमा उपयोगी हुन सक्छ।

entries.source: AI roleplay
entries.value: AI भूमिका-अभिनय

entries.source: an ordinary person affected by the decision;
entries.value: निर्णयबाट प्रभावित साधारण व्यक्ति;

entries.source: Ask the AI to label uncertainty.
entries.value: AI लाई uncertainty label गर्न भन्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Character voice plus evidence notes
entries.value: character voice र evidence notes

entries.source: Continue the route
entries.value: route जारी राख्नुहोस्

entries.source: Dates and summaries matter, but learners often need a way into the human situation: what people believed, what choices they saw, what limits shaped them, and what they could not have known.
entries.value: Dates र summaries महत्त्वपूर्ण हुन्छन्, तर learners लाई अक्सर human situation भित्र पस्ने बाटो चाहिन्छ: मानिसहरूले के विश्वास गर्थे, उनीहरूले के choices देख्थे, कुन limits ले उनीहरूलाई आकार दियो, र उनीहरूले के थाहा पाउन सक्दैनथे।

entries.source: For example, a learner studying democracy might talk with Ambedkar, then ask Source Critic to evaluate a speech or constitutional passage. A learner studying a city can start with Geography Explorer to understand place, then move into historical conversation.
entries.value: उदाहरणका लागि, democracy पढिरहेको learner ले Ambedkar सँग कुरा गर्न सक्छ, त्यसपछि Source Critic लाई speech वा constitutional passage evaluate गर्न सोध्न सक्छ। city पढिरहेको learner ले place बुझ्न Geography Explorer बाट सुरु गरेर historical conversation मा जान सक्छ।

entries.source: Good guardrails for students
entries.value: students का लागि राम्रो guardrails

entries.source: Historical roleplay can make context, choices, and ideas easier to remember when it separates imagination from evidence.
entries.value: Historical roleplay ले imagination लाई evidence बाट अलग राख्दा context, choices, र ideas सम्झन सजिलो बनाउन सक्छ।

entries.source: Historical roleplay is especially powerful when learners compare perspectives. After speaking with one figure, ask for another point of view:
entries.value: Historical roleplay learners ले perspectives compare गर्दा विशेष शक्तिशाली हुन्छ। एक figure सँग कुरा गरेपछि अर्को point of view माग्नुहोस्:

entries.source: History becomes more memorable without pretending uncertainty has disappeared.
entries.value: uncertainty हराएको pretend नगरी history अझ memorable हुन्छ।

entries.source: History is easier to remember when it feels inhabited.
entries.value: History inhabited महसुस हुँदा सम्झन सजिलो हुन्छ।

entries.source: Learning history by talking to historical figures with AI
entries.value: AI सँग historical figures सँग कुरा गरेर history सिक्ने

entries.source: Separate in-character claims from evidence notes.
entries.value: in-character claims लाई evidence notes बाट अलग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Start with Talk to a Historical Person for a figure-led conversation. Use Time Travel for a place-and-period expedition. Read the Talk to a Historical Person guide or the Time Travel prompts and study loop if you want a more structured workflow.
entries.value: figure-led conversation का लागि Talk to a Historical Person बाट सुरु गर्नुहोस्। place-and-period expedition का लागि Time Travel प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्। अझ structured workflow चाहनुहुन्छ भने Talk to a Historical Person guide वा Time Travel prompts and study loop पढ्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Talking to a historical figure is not magic access to the past. It is a learning format.
entries.value: historical figure सँग कुरा गर्नु past मा magic access होइन। यो learning format हो।

entries.source: That combination is more useful than either layer alone. A plain encyclopedia summary can be forgettable. Pure roleplay can be misleading. Voice plus evidence creates a better learning surface.
entries.value: त्यो combination कुनै पनि layer एक्लै भन्दा उपयोगी छ। plain encyclopedia summary forgettable हुन सक्छ। pure roleplay misleading हुन सक्छ। voice plus evidence ले better learning surface बनाउँछ।

entries.source: That is how inspir approaches historical conversation: a persona card, an in-character reply, and context notes that keep imagination connected to evidence.
entries.value: inspir historical conversation लाई यसरी approach गर्छ: persona card, in-character reply, र imagination लाई evidence सँग connected राख्ने context notes।

entries.source: That kind of questioning turns history from a list into a context.
entries.value: त्यो kind of questioning ले history लाई list बाट context मा बदल्छ।

entries.source: The AI should separate character from evidence. It can answer in a historically grounded voice, but it should also add notes when records are incomplete, interpretations differ, or the response is a reconstruction.
entries.value: AI ले character लाई evidence बाट separate गर्नुपर्छ। यसले historically grounded voice मा answer गर्न सक्छ, तर records incomplete छन्, interpretations differ गर्छन्, वा response reconstruction हो भने notes पनि add गर्नुपर्छ।

entries.source: The first layer is the roleplay. It can speak in an accessible voice, explain motives, and make the situation vivid. This is the part that helps memory.
entries.value: पहिलो layer roleplay हो। यसले accessible voice मा बोल्न, motives explain गर्न, र situation vivid बनाउन सक्छ। memory लाई help गर्ने part यही हो।

entries.source: The format works because it lets learners ask questions such as:
entries.value: format ले काम गर्छ किनकि यसले learners लाई यस्ता questions सोध्न दिन्छ:

entries.source: The goal is not to make the AI the authority. The goal is to make learners ask better historical questions.
entries.value: goal AI लाई authority बनाउनु होइन। goal learners लाई better historical questions सोध्न लगाउनु हो।

entries.source: The promise is not that AI can summon the past. It cannot. The promise is that roleplay can make context easier to question, compare, and remember when the experience is clearly separated from evidence.
entries.value: promise AI ले past summon गर्न सक्छ भन्ने होइन। सक्दैन। promise भनेको experience evidence बाट स्पष्ट अलग हुँदा roleplay ले context लाई question, compare, र remember गर्न सजिलो बनाउन सक्छ भन्ने हो।

entries.source: The safety rule
entries.value: safety rule

entries.source: The second layer is the evidence note. It should say when something is directly documented, widely interpreted, disputed, or reconstructed for learning. This is the part that protects accuracy.
entries.value: second layer evidence note हो। यसले कुनै कुरा directly documented, widely interpreted, disputed, वा learning का लागि reconstructed हो भने भन्नुपर्छ। accuracy protect गर्ने part यही हो।

entries.source: The strongest questions are not trivia questions. They are context questions.
entries.value: strongest questions trivia questions होइनन्। ती context questions हुन्।

entries.source: The useful part of historical roleplay
entries.value: historical roleplay को useful part

entries.source: These questions help the learner see history as a set of pressures and interpretations rather than a costume drama. They also keep the AI honest. The more the learner asks about evidence, limits, and perspective, the less likely the session is to become fantasy wearing a famous name.
entries.value: यी questions ले learner लाई history लाई costume drama होइन pressures र interpretations को set का रूपमा देख्न मद्दत गर्छन्। तिनीहरूले AI लाई honest पनि राख्छन्। learner ले evidence, limits, र perspective बारे जति धेरै सोध्छ, session famous name लगाएको fantasy बन्ने सम्भावना उति कम हुन्छ।

entries.source: Try prompts like:
entries.value: यस्ता प्रम्प्टहरू प्रयास गर्नुहोस्:

entries.source: Use historical AI roleplay with three rules:
entries.value: तीन नियमसहित historical AI roleplay प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्:

entries.source: Use it for comparison
entries.value: comparison का लागि प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Verify important facts with trusted sources, textbooks, or teacher-provided materials.
entries.value: important facts लाई trusted sources, textbooks, वा teacher-provided materials बाट verify गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: What choices were available?
entries.value: कुन choices उपलब्ध थिए?

entries.source: What did their society assume?
entries.value: उनीहरूको society ले के assume गरेको थियो?

entries.source: What did this person care about?
entries.value: यो person ले के कुराको care गर्थ्यो?

entries.source: What to ask a historical figure
entries.value: historical figure लाई के सोध्ने

entries.source: What would modern readers misunderstand?
entries.value: modern readers ले के गलत बुझ्थे?

entries.source: Which parts are well documented and which parts are uncertain?
entries.value: कुन parts राम्रोसँग documented छन् र कुन parts uncertain छन्?

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: तपाईं Talk to a Historical Person मा format प्रयास गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ। व्यक्तिलाई भेट्नुअघि wider scene चाहनुहुन्छ भने Time Travel प्रयोग गरेर period visit गर्नुहोस्, constraints inspect गर्नुहोस्, अनि मानिसहरूसँग वास्तवमा के choices थिए भनेर सोध्नुहोस्।
